findings.title: Outdated libmicrohttpd with known vulnerabilities
findings.description: libmicrohttpd linked without version constraints; older versions have DoS and memory handling CVEs

findings.title: Outdated libcurl dependency with multiple CVEs
findings.description: libcurl linked without version constraints; has numerous CVEs including heap buffer overflow and credential leakage

findings.title: Outdated Jansson library without version pinning
findings.description: Jansson JSON library linked without version constraints; older versions have parsing and memory handling issues

findings.title: No compiler security hardening flags
findings.description: Makefile omits -fstack-protector-strong, -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2, -fPIE, and other security hardening flags
